paragraphs.text: LOVE

DAVID: Psa 133:1 A Song of degrees (Ascent) of David. Behold, how good and how pleasant it is for brethren to dwell together in unity! Psa 133:2 It is like the precious ointment upon the head, that ran down upon the beard, even Aaron's beard: that went down to the skirts of his garments; Psa 133:3 As the dew of Hermon, and as the dew that descended upon the mountains of Zion: for there THE YAHWEH commanded the blessing, even life for evermore.

JESUS: On the day, We shall pour Our blessing through SHEKINAIH who represents Us, THE TRINITY, and she shall pour on you, My Spiritual Aaron, and from you, it shall flow to My elders, and from them to My body of Anointed Ones which dwell in the bond of love who are fit to be with Me in My Heavenly Mount Zion. To these Brides, they shall be My house, the support pillar and foundation ground of truth, the New Jerusalem which will come down from heaven.

Rev 3:11 Behold, I come quickly: hold that fast which thou hast, that no man take thy crown. Rev 3:12 Him that overcometh will I make a pillar in the temple of my THE ELOHIM, and he shall go no more out: and I will write upon him of my THE ELOHIM, and the name of the city of my THE ELOHIM, which is new Jerusalem, which cometh down out of heaven from my THE ELOHIM: and I will write upon him my new name.
David, can you read now 1 Tim 3:15-16?

DAVID: 1Tim 3:15 But if I tarry long, that thou mayest know how thou oughtest to behave thyself in the house of THE ELOHIM, which is the church of the living THE ELOHIM, the pillar and ground of the truth. 1Tim 3:16 And without controversy great is the mystery of godliness: god was manifest in the flesh, justified in the Spirit, seen (perceive) of angels, preached unto the Gentiles, believed in the world, take up (G353 "analambano") in glory. JESUS: 1 Tim 3:15-16 is another witness for the ascent to My Holy Mount. Great is the mystery of godliness/holiness: these mini gods whom My Father hath sanctified, and sent into the world (Joh 10:33-36) was with My FATHER from the beginning (1Jn 2:13-14); their counterpart angels do always behold the face of My FATHER (Mat 18:10), was manifest (incarnated) in the flesh, justified in the Spirit (are strong in the word of truth and have overcome the evil one and bear all the fruits of righteousness), perceive of angels ( have the revelation of the sufferings and the glory that should follow them as a Christ), preached unto the gentiles (the true gospel must first preached unto the 7000 Gentiles first, afterward they to Israel in the flesh), believed in the world
(saved by faith through by manifold testings in this world), take up in glory (at last seize up into glory as My Brides, the Heavenly New Jerusalem).

Joh 10:33 The Jews answered him, saying, For a good work we stone thee not; but for blasphemy; and because that thou, being a man, makest thyself God. Joh 10:34 JESUS answered them, Is it not written in your law, I said, Ye are gods? Joh 10:35 If he called them gods, unto whom the word of GOD came, and the scripture cannot be broken; Joh 10:36 Say ye of him, whom THE FATHER hath sanctified, and sent into the world, Thou blasphemest; because I said, I am the Son of THE ELOHIM?

1Jn 2:13 I write unto you, fathers, because ye have known him that is from the beginning. I write unto you, young men, because ye have overcome the wicked one. I write unto you, little children, because ye have known THE FATHER. 1Jn 2:14 I have written unto you, fathers, because ye have known him that is from the beginning. I have written unto you, young men, because ye are strong, and the word of THE ELOHIM abideth in you, and ye have overcome the wicked one.
Mat 18:10 Take heed that ye despise not one of these little ones; for I say unto you, That in heaven their angels do always behold the face of my Father which is in heaven.
Mat 18:11 For the Son of man is come to save that which was lost.
Therefore in your ascent, bless My FATHER all ye His servants who desire to be priests and stand in Our house in Heavenly Jerusalem.

Psa 134:1 A Song of degrees (Ascent). Behold, bless ye THE YAHWEH, all ye servants of THE YAHWEH, which by night stand in the house of THE YAHWEH. Psa 134:2 Lift up your hands in the sanctuary, and bless THE YAHWEH. Psa 134:3 THE YAHWEH that made heaven and earth bless thee out of Zion.
CHAPTER 3
THE PATH OF THE BRIDES
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, can you elaborate on the five levels the Brides have to ascend?
JESUS: The five levels the Brides need to go through are:
Peace And Joy Through Tribulation
Meekness Of Love Through Persecution
Lowliness Of Mind Through Oppression
Yieldedness
Faith in THE ELOHIM
